_publications._publicationTitle: Discovery of a small molecule targeting IRA2 deletion in budding yeast and neurofibromin loss in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: The resistance conferred by NAB3 overexpression was easily appreciated on agar
details: NAB3 overexpression conferred resistance to UC1, suppressing UC1 sensitivity in erg6Δ ira2Δ strain
